section_name: Change of Name or Address of License or Permit Holder; Offense
text:
(a) The holder of a commercial driver’s license or commercial learner’s permit who changes the holder’s name or mailing address must apply for a duplicate license or permit not later than the 30th day after the date of the change in the manner provided by Section 521.054 (Notice of Change of Address or Name) .

(b) The holder of a commercial driver’s license or commercial learner’s permit who changes the holder’s residence address shall notify the department not later than the 30th day after the date of the change.

(c) A person commits an offense if the person violates this section. An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 522. Commercial Driver's Licenses
##### § 522.032 — Change of Name or Address of License or Permit Holder; Offense

(a) The holder of a commercial driver’s license or commercial learner’s permit who changes the holder’s name or mailing address must apply for a duplicate license or permit not later than the 30th day after the date of the change in the manner provided by Section 521.054 (Notice of Change of Address or Name) .

(b) The holder of a commercial driver’s license or commercial learner’s permit who changes the holder’s residence address shall notify the department not later than the 30th day after the date of the change.

(c) A person commits an offense if the person violates this section. An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

*Acts 2015, 84th Leg., R.S., Ch. 752 (H.B.1888), Sec. 17, eff. January 1, 2016.*

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The holder of a commercial driver’s license or commercial learner’s permit who changes the holder’s residence address shall notify the department not later than the 30th day after the date of the change.

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: A person commits an offense if the person violates this section. An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.
